'''Colavas Tertiary''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colavas system]]. A [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by nine [[Moon/Legends|moons]], Colavas Tertiary was the fourth planet in the system.
